tasks.description: Create database schema for projects, cost items, contacts, quotations, invoices, and log items
steps: Project table exists with id, name, description, status, userId, timestamps
CostItem table exists with id, projectId, name, description, amount, date, receiptFileUrl
Contact table exists with id, userId, name, email, phone, company
Quotation table exists with id, projectId, contactId, description, amount, status, fileUrl
Invoice table exists with id, projectId, quotationId, description, amount, fileUrl, isPaid
LogItem table exists with id, projectId, type, referenceId, description, createdAt
Relations defined between all tables
Run pnpm db:push successfully

tasks.description: Users can create, edit, and archive projects
steps: POST /api/project/create creates project with name and description
Project appears in database with correct userId
User can edit project name and description
User can archive project (soft delete)
Projects list page shows only user's non-archived projects

tasks.description: Users can manage cost items with receipt uploads
steps: User can add cost item with name, description, amount, date
Cost item appears in database linked to project
File upload for receipts via S3 signed URL works
Receipt file URL saved to cost item
Cost item appears in project timeline
User can edit and delete cost items
Deleting cost item removes it from timeline

tasks.description: Users can manage contacts for contractors
steps: User can create contact with name, email, phone, company
Contact appears in database with userId
Contacts page lists all user's contacts
Contact can be created inline when adding quotation
Contact details can be edited

tasks.description: Users can create and manage quotations
steps: User can add quotation with description, amount, contact, receivedDate
Quotation status can be set to pending/accepted/rejected
File upload for quotation PDFs works via S3
Quotation appears in project timeline
Quotations list shows on project detail page
User can update quotation status

tasks.description: Users can convert quotations to invoices
steps: User can click 'Convert to Invoice' on accepted quotation
Invoice created with link to original quotation
Invoice has description, amount, invoiceDate, isPaid fields
File upload for invoice PDFs works
Invoice appears in project timeline
Converting updates project actual spending calculation

tasks.description: Project timeline displays all activities chronologically
steps: Timeline shows cost items, quotations, invoices, and comments
Events sorted by date, newest first
Each event shows type icon, date, and description
User can add manual comments to timeline
Timeline is filterable by event type

tasks.description: Financial dashboard shows estimated vs actual spending
steps: Project detail shows estimated total (sum of accepted quotations)
Project detail shows actual total (sum of cost items + invoices)
Visual progress bar shows actual vs estimated ratio
Green color when under budget, red when over
SEK currency formatting displays correctly with 'kr' symbol

tasks.description: Landing page and dashboard layout match reference repo style
steps: Landing page uses card-based design with rounded corners
Colors match reference: oklch color system, green/red for financial data
Mobile-first responsive design works at all breakpoints
Navigation header with project list and contacts links
Project list page shows card grid with summary info

tasks.description: All data is isolated per user (multi-tenant)
steps: All queries filter by authenticated userId
User cannot access other users' projects
User cannot access other users' contacts
User cannot access other users' cost items, quotations, or invoices
Attempting to access another user's data returns 404 or redirects

tasks.description: Remove example Post files and update documentation
steps: Delete example post files from lib/core/post/
Remove post table from schema or keep only if needed
Update AGENTS.md with Byggabo-specific domain information
Verify pnpm tsc passes with no errors
Verify pnpm lint passes with no errors

patterns: Effect-TS database access: use yield* inside Effect.gen, never await
Server actions: one action per file ending in -action.ts
RSC pattern: Suspense + Content with dynamic = 'force-dynamic' for auth pages
File uploads: S3 signed URL pattern - getUploadUrlAction then client upload
Visual style: Tailwind CSS 4, card-based UI, oklch colors, SEK currency
nonGoals: Payment processing - not an invoicing system for contractors
Project templates - all projects created from scratch
Mobile native app - responsive web only
Accounting software integration - manual exports only
